roa.docketEntryComment: FUR PROC RE REMITTITUR
FUR PROC RE REMITTITUR

CRT RECEIVED REMITTITUR;REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON THE MINUTESCA DECISION(AFFIRMED);REMANDED TO CORRECT SENT ERROR;APPEAR OF DEFT WVDCRT ORD-5YR TERM 667/1192,7PC STRKN FOR LEGAL CAUSE IN LIEUCRT IMPOSED 1YR SP PUR TO 667,5(B)PC

MO NEW TRL DEN;A/JWV;PROB DEN;CT1-SP12Y(U);CT STATES REAS SENT CHOICECT DESIGNATES CT1-PRIN TERM FOR ALLEG 12022(A)(2)PC SP3Y,C/SCT2-SP12Y(U),C/C/12022(A)(2)PC SP3Y-STAYED 654PCCT3-SP12Y(U)/12022(A)(2)PC SP3Y-STYD;CT4-SP12Y(UP)/12022(A)(2)PC 3Y-STYEDCT5-SP5Y(M),C/C-12022(A)(2)PC SP3Y-STAYED;CT6-SP2Y(M),C/C(1)667/1192,7PC SP5Y,C/S SENT IN CT1;(1)667,5(B)PC STRKN;TOT UNSTYD SP20Y$1200RF;CTS373D;DEFT ADV APPEAL/PAROLE RTS;REMAND CDC SAN QUENTIN
TRANSF TO D27 FOR FUR PROC RE REMITTITUR AT 9AM ON 8/5/94
5DCJ,CTS5D-BODY ATTACHMENT DISCHARGED;PROC RE PROB - O/C
DEFT PERS WVS TIME
SUBM BY CNSL-1ST 5DAY-15DCTS;2ND 2D-2DCTS;7DAYS C/S TO ANY OTH COMM SENT
JURY FNDS DEFT G CTS1,2,3&4-245(A)(3)PC/F & 12022(A)(2)PC TRUE-CTS1,2,3,4FNDS DEFT G CT5 246PC/F&ALLEG 12022(A)(2)PC TRUE;FNDS G CT6 12021(A)PC/F
WIT CHARVED AUGUSTIN B/A ISSUED;BAIL SET $100,000
DEEMED MISTRIAL;CT GRTS MO ALL EVID W/D;DEFENSE MO OR DEFT DEN,REM CUST
PEO MKE MO FOR B/A WIT-DAVIS/D OVER DEFNS OBJ;CT ORD B/A ISSUE-$1000 BAIL
CONT 11/9/92 AT 930 IN THE CORONER'S COURTROOMB/A ISSUED FOR WITN AUGUSTINE/C & BAIL SET AT $25,000
DEFT IS ADV/WVS CONSTL/CITIZ RTS;STIP 667/1192,7-10/25/87 CT6 OF INFO
WITN ORD TO RETWITNESS ORDERED TO RETURN
DEEMED PRETRIED
DA FILE AMEND INFO;MO 995PC DEN;F/ARR WVD;DEFT PLD NG ALL CTS & ALLEGS
ARR;DEFT PLD NG A CT;DEN ALL ALLEGS
KENNETH JOUBERT BODY ATTCH DISCH, 2DCJ-2DCTS CONTEMPT
HTA, B/S $100,000, BODY ATTACH ISS FOR K/JOUBERT, B/S $20,000
DEF MOT TO CONTINUE GRANTED; DEFT PERS WAIVES TIME
